critique: Step 1 is incorrect. The question asks to compare the heights of two specific contestants, which requires filtering the table to only the rows for “rossemely cruz logroño” and “yisney lina lagrange méndez.” Using f_select_row(*) without a filtering condition selects all rows and fails to isolate the relevant entries, impeding a precise comparison of their heights. An appropriate operation would explicitly filter for those contestants (e.g., f_select_row(contestant in {"rossemely cruz logroño","yisney lina lagrange méndez"})).
